Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.runticket.model.Event
Direct Known Subclasses:
Concert, Festival, Sport
public abstract class Event extends Object
The Event class represents an event with details such as name, date, time, type, cost, venue, tickets, seating, and invoices. It provides methods to access and modify event information, manage tickets and seating, and handle invoices for ticket purchases.
Author:
Francisco Garcia, Adrian Sifuentes, Henry Ng

    Abstract method that will print out event-specific information
    void
    refund(Invoice invoiceIn, String invoiceIDIn)
    Method to process a refund for a given invoice The method updates the event's financials and seating accordingly Only the fees are non-refundable Removes the invoice from the invoice list

    seatsLeft()
    Method to print out the number of seats left according to tier
    void
    seatsSold(String tierIn, int numIn)
    Method to add the number of seats sold according to tier when a transaction is made It also substract the number of seats left in the chosen tier

    • getVIPPrice

      public double getVIPPrice()
      Returns the event's VIP tier ticket price
      Returns:
      tickets.get("VIP").getPrice() the price set for the ticket VIP tier, stored in the tickets HashMap

    • getGoldPrice

      public double getGoldPrice()
      Returns the event's Gold tier ticket price
      Returns:
      tickets.get("Gold").getPrice() the price set for the ticket Gold tier, stored in the tickets HashMap

      public double getGAPrice()
      Returns the event's General Adminission tier ticket price

      tickets.get("General Admission").getPrice() the price set for the ticket General Admission tier, stored in the tickets HashMap

      Returns:

    • setTickets

      public void setTickets(String tierIn, double priceIn, double percentageIn)
      Method to set the prices and percentages for each ticket tier. Also sets the revenue to 0 for each ticket tier.
      Parameters:
      tierIn - The ticket tier to be set
      priceIn - The price to be set
      percentageIn - The percentage to be set

    • getPrices

      public void getPrices()
      Method to print the ticket prices according to tier

    • getTicketPrice

      public double getTicketPrice(String tierIn)
      Method to return the price for a ticket tier
      Parameters:
      tierIn - The tier for which the price will be returned
      Returns:
      returnPrice the price of the requested tier

    • setSeats

      public void setSeats()
      Method to set the percentage of seats according to tier.

    • seatsSold

      public void seatsSold(String tierIn, int numIn)
      Method to add the number of seats sold according to tier when a transaction is made It also substract the number of seats left in the chosen tier
      Parameters:
      tierIn - The tier of the tickets being purchased
      numIn - The number of tickets being purchased

    • getSeatsLeft

      public int getSeatsLeft(String tier)
      Returns how many seats are left for a given ticket type

    • seatsLeft

      public void seatsLeft()
      Method to print out the number of seats left according to tier

      Method to add invoices to invoiceList
      Parameters:
      invoiceIn - the invoice being added

    • getInvoiceList

      public HashMap<String,Invoice> getInvoiceList()
      Returns the event's invoice list
      Returns:
      invoiceList the event's invoice list

    • displayInvoices

      public void displayInvoices()
      Method to display the event's invoice list

    • addOverhead

      public void addOverhead(double taxIn, double discountIn)
      Adds tax revenue and the costs of membership discounts
      Parameters:
      taxIn - The tax being added to taxRevenue
      discountIn - The discount costs being added to discountCosts

    • addRevenue

      public void addRevenue(String tierIn, double revenueIn, double ticketFeesIn, double charityFeesIn, double convenienceFeesIn)
      Adds revenue to a ticket tier whenever a ticket is purchased
      Parameters:
      tierIn - The tier of the ticket being pruchased
      revenueIn - The revenue colelcted from the transaction
      ticketFeesIn - The ticket fees collected from the transaction
      charityFeesIn - The charity fees collected from the transaction
      convenienceFeesIn - The convenience fees collected from the transaction

    • eventRevenue

      public void eventRevenue()
      Method to print the event's financial information

    • expectedProfit

      public double expectedProfit()
      Method to calculate and return the event's expected profit
      Returns:
      profit the event's expected profit

    • getSeatsSold

      public int getSeatsSold(String tierIn)
      Method to return the number of seats sold in each tier
      Parameters:
      tierIn - The tier of the number of seats being returned
      Returns:
      seatsSold the number of seats sold

    • getTicketsRevenue

      public double getTicketsRevenue(String tierIn)
      Method to return the revenue of a tier
      Parameters:
      tierIn - The tier chosen
      Returns:
      tierRevenue the revenue of the tier chosen

    • printInfo

      public abstract void printInfo()
      Abstract method that will print out event-specific information

    • refund

      public void refund(Invoice invoiceIn, String invoiceIDIn)
      Method to process a refund for a given invoice The method updates the event's financials and seating accordingly Only the fees are non-refundable Removes the invoice from the invoice list
      Parameters:
      invoiceIn - The invoice to be refunded
      invoiceIDIn - The ID of the invoice to be refunded
